# CWE-940 negative: state parameter validates callback (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-940-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

// CWE-940 mitigated: callback rejected when state cookie does not match request.

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
)

func OAuthCallbackVerifiedPure(db *sql.DB) http.HandlerFunc {
	return func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		code := r.URL.Query().Get("code")
		state := r.URL.Query().Get("state")
		cookie, err := r.Cookie("oauth_state")
		if err != nil || cookie.Value != state {
			http.Error(w, "invalid oauth state", http.StatusForbidden)
			return
		}
		userID := r.Header.Get("X-Authenticated-User")
		if userID == "" {
			http.Error(w, "login required", http.StatusUnauthorized)
			return
		}
		_, err = db.Exec(
			"INSERT INTO oauth_tokens (user_id, code) VALUES ($1, $2)",
			userID, code,
		)
		if err != nil {
			http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)
			return
		}
		http.Redirect(w, r, "/dashboard", http.StatusFound)
	}
}
